channel.title: 4minit - Mauritius News in 4 Minutes
channel.description: A free daily newsletter covering Mauritius news, regional developments, and the global headlines that matter — in your inbox every morning.

item.title: Fifty-seven years, then a resignation letter: Bérenger walks out of the MMM
item.description: Today's 4minit: Alalila faces court challenge as taxi drivers revolt. Mauritius: Chagos fight continues after UK shelves the deal. US blockade of Hormuz begins as Iran calls it piracy.. Read more.

item.title: Your electricity bill just got more expensive, and that's just the start
item.description: Today's 4minit: London puts the Chagos deal on ice. Iran's new Supreme Leader: wounded and out of sight. Oil tops $100 as US blockades Iranian ports.. Read more.

item.title: UK puts the Chagos deal on ice, and Mauritius is left waiting
item.description: Today's 4minit: Bread up, electricity up: the cabinet's crisis playbook. Ethiopia's Easter, overshadowed by fuel queues. Artemis crew splashes down after first Moon flyby in 52 years.. Read more.
